docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TABOADA, PORFIRIO AS TO DEFENDANT VELAZQUEZ, BENJAMIN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
